headline: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) is a Trending Stock
summary: Airbnb (ABNB) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

headline: Why Airbnb (ABNB) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of online accommodations platform Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) jumped 5% in the afternoon session after a drop in oil prices and Treasury yields created a favorable macro backdrop for consumer travel demand.
